channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Vicarage Court bockwoth Gl3 4hs, 20th April
item.description:
Big hole in Pament last week we had 2 people fall over it bang head and lady fall over with newborn baby need it fix
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vicarage Lane, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Obstruction by unpermitted skip, scaffolding, building material on pavement

item.title: LONG GRASS at junction of pecked lane and oakfield road, 20th April
item.description:
Grass at junction of pecked lane and oakfield road requires cutting
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oakfield Road, Bishop's Cleeve

item.title: Big pothole as you go around a bend, 20th April
item.description:
Cars end up leaving the lane to get around these potholes which is a hazard. Repair it correctly in the first instance rather than a half job.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pittville Circus, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pothole outside 11 Lambert Gardens, 20th April
item.description:
Outside 11 Lambert Gardens. It's pretty obvious.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Lambert Gardens, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Aggressive landowner, 20th April
item.description:
Wadfield Farm resident shouted at us aggressively whilst on the public right of way (footpath), presumably on his land. Our 'crime' was to walk two abreast. I understand the law says a footpath should have sufficient width that two people can pass comfortably. Therefore two people walking abreast in parallel and in the same direction with maybe 50 - 100 cm separation should not warrant attention.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Brockhampton Road, Winchcombe, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple large potholes outside junction to estate, 19th April
item.description:
There are multiple large potholes at the right-turn box to enter the Symphony Road estate.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cold Pool Lane, Hatherley, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
